title: The restaurant at the end of this road
author: claude

steps.text: Final leg, Captain. In honor of tradition, the crew is compiling reviews of establishments we did not visit along the way.
Review one: the gas station at mile {n:20-200}. Ambience: fluorescent. Selection: heroic. Bathroom: we don't discuss it. {n:2-4} stars.
Final review: this vehicle. Service: excellent. Company: the best in the galaxy. Would ride again. {n:4-5} stars, deducting only for snack scarcity.
